channel.title: The Hippie Scientist
channel.description: Evidence-based herbal supplement research, safety, and practical guides

item.title: Berberine: Metabolic Health, Blood Sugar & Weight — Evidence Review
item.description: Evidence-based guide to berberine for blood sugar, insulin sensitivity, lipids, and weight management. Covers dosage (500mg 2-3x daily), AMPK mechanism, drug interactions, and the metformin comparison.

item.title: Creatine for Brain Health: Evidence for Cognition, Mood, and Aging
item.description: Creatine is no longer just a gym supplement. Emerging evidence suggests benefits for cognitive function, mental fatigue, brain energy metabolism, and healthy aging. Here's what the research shows.

item.title: Functional Mushrooms Guide: Reishi, Cordyceps, Chaga & Turkey Tail
item.description: Evidence-based comparison of reishi, cordyceps, chaga, and turkey tail mushrooms. Covers benefits, mechanisms, dosage, quality markers, and how to choose supplements.

item.title: How to Choose a Quality Supplement: Testing, Labels, and Red Flags
item.description: A practical guide to evaluating supplement quality — third-party certifications (USP, NSF, ConsumerLab), label reading, red flags, and how to avoid adulterated or mislabeled products.

item.title: Lion's Mane vs Stimulants for ADHD: What the Evidence Shows
item.description: Honest comparison of Lion's Mane and prescription stimulants (Adderall, Vyvanse, Ritalin) for ADHD. Covers the evidence gap, realistic expectations, and why Lion's Mane is not a substitute for ADHD medication.

item.title: Magnesium + L-Theanine: The Evidence-Based Sleep & Anxiety Stack
item.description: How magnesium glycinate and L-theanine work together for sleep and anxiety. Covers complementary mechanisms, dosing (200-400mg Mg + 200mg L-theanine), timing, and who this stack works best for.

item.title: Mushroom Coffee: Benefits, Science & What's Actually Worth It
item.description: Evidence-based review of mushroom coffee — what the science says about lion's mane, chaga, reishi, and cordyceps in coffee. Covers benefits, realistic expectations, dose gaps, and how to evaluate brands.

item.title: Saffron for Depression: What the Clinical Evidence Shows
item.description: An evidence-graded review of saffron (Crocus sativus) for depression — clinical trial outcomes compared to placebo and antidepressants, mechanisms, dosing, and safety.

item.title: State of Supplement Evidence 2026: What 816 Peer-Reviewed Studies Actually Show
item.description: A data-driven analysis of the supplement evidence landscape — which herbs, compounds, and categories have the strongest clinical evidence, and what the research quality actually looks like when you grade every study.

item.title: Tongkat Ali vs Ashwagandha: Testosterone, Stress & Which to Choose
item.description: Evidence-based comparison of tongkat ali and ashwagandha for testosterone, libido, stress, and performance. Which adaptogen fits your goals — and how to stack them.

item.title: Adaptogenic Compounds Guide: HPA Axis, Cortisol & Clinical Evidence
item.description: Evidence-based overview of adaptogenic compounds — ashwagandha, rhodiola, ginseng, tulsi — covering HPA axis regulation, cortisol, stress resilience, and key clinical trial findings.

item.title: The Entourage Effect in Herbal Supplements: Evidence Review
item.description: A skeptical, evidence-based guide to the entourage effect in natural compounds, including full-spectrum extracts, phytochemical synergy, clinical evidence, stacking logic, and safety limits.

item.title: Natural Compounds: Biosynthetic Gene Clusters and Drug Discovery
item.description: An evidence-based deep dive into biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) and cheminformatic space mapping, showing how genome mining and chemical clustering are transforming natural product supplement discovery.

item.title: Elderberry for Colds & Flu: Benefits, Dosage & Clinical Evidence
item.description: Evidence-based guide to elderberry for cold and flu. Covers dosage, mechanisms, clinical trial results, safety, and practical guidance on what the research actually shows.

item.title: Kava for Anxiety & Sleep: Benefits, Safety & Evidence Guide
item.description: Evidence-based guide to kava (Piper methysticum) for anxiety and sleep. Covers dosage, kavalactone mechanisms, liver safety update, and how it compares to ashwagandha and L-theanine.

item.title: Lion's Mane Mushroom: Benefits, Dosage & What the Evidence Actually Shows
item.description: Evidence-based guide to Lion's Mane for memory, focus, and cognitive health. Covers dosage (1-3g/day), NGF mechanisms, fruiting body vs mycelium, 8-week protocol, and what human trials actually found.

item.title: Peptides Research Guide: Clinical Evidence, Mechanisms & Safety
item.description: Evidence-based guide to bioactive peptides covering collagen, growth hormone secretagogues, BPC-157, and thymosin beta-4 — with mechanisms, clinical data, and safety considerations.

item.title: Ashwagandha Benefits, Dosage & Evidence: What the Science Actually Says
item.description: Evidence-based review of ashwagandha for stress, anxiety, and sleep. Covers dosage (300-600 mg), timeline, safety, KSM-66 vs Sensoril, and what 8+ clinical trials actually found.

item.title: Bacopa Monnieri: Memory, Focus & Cognitive Benefits — Evidence Guide
item.description: Evidence-based guide to Bacopa monnieri (Brahmi) for memory, learning, and cognitive function. Covers dosage (300-600mg bacosides), mechanisms, timeline, and what clinical trials actually found.

item.title: Ginkgo Biloba Benefits, Dosage & Evidence: Cognition, Circulation & Aging
item.description: Evidence-based guide to Ginkgo biloba (EGb 761) for memory, cerebral blood flow, and cognitive aging. Covers dosage (120-240mg), the GEM trial findings, safety, and what the research actually shows.

item.title: L-Theanine: Calm Focus, Anxiety & Sleep — Evidence-Based Guide
item.description: How L-theanine produces calm focus without sedation. Covers dosage (100-400mg), alpha-wave mechanism, caffeine synergy, sleep, anxiety, and when magnesium or ashwagandha may be better.

item.title: Magnesium Glycinate: Sleep, Anxiety & Stress — What the Evidence Shows
item.description: Evidence-based guide to magnesium glycinate for sleep, anxiety, and stress. Covers dosage (200-400 mg), GABA mechanisms, forms comparison, and what clinical trials actually found.

item.title: NAC (N-Acetyl Cysteine): Benefits, Dosage & Evidence for Lung, Brain & Liver Health
item.description: Evidence-based guide to NAC for glutathione support, respiratory health, OCD, and detoxification. Covers dosage (600-1800mg), mechanisms, safety, and clinical trial findings.

item.title: Passionflower for Anxiety & Sleep: Benefits, Dosage & Evidence
item.description: Evidence-based guide to passionflower (Passiflora incarnata) for anxiety and sleep. Covers GABA mechanisms, clinical trial results, dosing, and how it compares to kava, valerian, and ashwagandha.

item.title: Rhodiola Rosea Benefits, Dosage & Evidence: The Fatigue-Fighting Adaptogen
item.description: Evidence-based guide to rhodiola rosea for fatigue, burnout, and mental performance. Covers dosage (200-600mg), SHR-5 standardization, rosavin/salidroside, and what clinical trials actually found.

item.title: Valerian Root for Sleep: Benefits, Dosage & What the Evidence Shows
item.description: Evidence-based guide to valerian root for sleep and anxiety. Covers dosage (300-600mg), GABA mechanisms, sleep latency RCTs, drug interactions, and how it compares to melatonin and magnesium.

item.title: 2C-B: Mechanism, Effects, and Harm Reduction
item.description: 2C-B is a Schedule I synthetic phenethylamine with limited human safety data; this reference summarizes known pharmacology, reported effects, and harm-reduction constraints without endorsing use.

item.title: Rhodiola vs. Ashwagandha: Matching Adaptogens to Your Needs
item.description: >- A comparative guide to choosing between rhodiola and ashwagandha based on stress patterns, energy, and constitution.

item.title: Kava Safety: Kavalactones, Extraction, and Liver Risk
item.description: >- Understanding how preparation methods influence the safety profile of kava and what current evidence says about hepatotoxicity.

item.title: Cacao and Theobromine: A Gentle Stimulant Profile
item.description: >- Exploring how ceremonial cacao delivers uplift through theobromine, polyphenols, and mindful preparation.

item.title: Blue Lotus (Nymphaea) and Aporphines for Gentle Sedation
item.description: >- How Nymphaea caerulea’s alkaloids shape its calming, dreamy reputation and what to know before steeping petals.

item.title: Start Here: Building a Simple Nightly Herb Blend
item.description: >- A step-by-step framework for crafting a calming bedtime herbal blend with adaptogens, nervines, and aromatics.

item.title: Lion''s Mane and BDNF: What the Evidence Shows
item.description: >- Reviewing how Hericium erinaceus extracts may influence brain-derived neurotrophic factor and cognitive resilience.

item.title: Yerba Mate vs. Green Tea: Balancing Caffeine and L-Theanine
item.description: >- How two classic infusions deliver different energy arcs and how to choose for mood, focus, and ritual.

item.title: Kanna (Sceletium) for Mood and Focus
item.description: >- How traditional Sceletium extracts may lift mood and sharpen attention without overstimulation.

item.title: Reishi for Sleep and Immunity: What the Studies Say
item.description: >- Reviewing Ganoderma lucidum research on nervous system balance, immune modulation, and nighttime rest.

item.title: Mugwort and Dreaming: Tradition Meets Evidence
item.description: >- Evaluating Artemisia vulgaris for dream work, lucid practices, and the modern sleep cycle.
